content.en:
The news of the fall of the Giant Eye Heavenly Ancestor spread far and wide, and it was also being discussed within the Universal Alliance, so Ye Tian naturally knew about it quickly.

"The Giant Eye Heavenly Ancestor is the one I saw before, but I didn't expect him to fall, it seems that he was killed by that boundary-breaking creature!"

Ye Tian was a little shocked, a Heavenly Ancestor could be killed so easily.

If it was in the outside world, it would be impossible for the fifth-stage combat power of the Boundary Breaking Level to kill a Heavenly Ancestor at all, at most it would be a rival to a weaker Heavenly Ancestor.

But inside the Eternal True Ruins, the strength of a Heavenly Ancestor like the Giant Eye Heavenly Ancestor was suppressed too much, and he could only exert the invincible-level fifth-stage combat power, even if he paid the price to explode, he could only have boundary-breaking level combat power for a short time, but there was no way to last.

Therefore, inside the Eternal True Ruins, the Heavenly Ancestor was not as powerful as a Boundary-Breaking Fifth Stage Great Ancestor!

"The Eternal True Ruins are too dangerous, that is, I have the ability to constantly copy my body, and I constantly copy the Infinite Realm Armor, otherwise no matter how many lives I have, I don't want to benefit from here!" Ye Tian sighed.

He guessed that the Giant Eye Heavenly Ancestor should have fallen for the white crystal, after all, the area of the battle was there.

Even the Heavenly Ancestors were desperate for this white crystal, and it was conceivable how valuable it should be.

"I have to get this white crystal out!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

The years passed, and a long time passed in the blink of an eye.

Due to the fall of the Giant Eye Heavenly Ancestor, many Great Ancestors did not dare to enter the Eternal True Ruins, so the Eternal True Ruins were very peaceful during this period of time.

this day.

Ye Tian finally began to copy the Infinite Realm Armor and his own copied body again.

After a long time, the Infinite Realm Armor successfully copied.

At this time, Ye Tian handed over the white crystal to his copy body again, and was escorted back and left by the Infinite Realm Armor Warrior.

......

"It's back!"

Ye Tian's copy body was severely damaged, and the Infinite Realm armor was also injured, but his luck was not bad, and he successfully escaped from that area.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian was about to leave the Eternal True Ruins, even if he entered the Eternal True Ruins again, he would have to send all the resources he had obtained so far back to the Xuanqi Realm.

In this way, he will have peace of mind.

In order to be able to successfully withdraw from the Eternal Ruins, he made a copy of the replica body to test and avoid some dangers.

After all, you must be 100% successful in withdrawing this time, otherwise as long as you fail once, all the gains on your body will be lost!

Time flies.

After many temptations, Ye Tian finally succeeded in coming out of the Eternal True Ruins.

Outside the Eternal Ruins.

Ye Tian and an Infinite Realm Armor came out, this Infinite Realm Armor was a little damaged, but the combat power was still there.

At this time, the other Great Ancestors were shocked when they saw Ye Tian.

"A fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform has emerged alive from the Eternal True Ruins?"

"I remember this Great Ancestor, he was one of the first Great Ancestors to enter the Eternal True Ruins, right?"

"Although he has an Infinite Realm Armor, but an Infinite Realm Armor is only comparable to the invincible level fifth stage combat power, the fallen invincible level fifth stage ancestor doesn't know much, let alone a dead thing!"

"I estimate that this Great Ancestor didn't go far into the Eternal True Ruins, he probably was trapped somewhere, and he dared to come out now. "

"I guess I'm hiding, otherwise I would have died I don't know how many times!"

Of course, these fifth-stage great ancestors did not mean to mock Ye Tian, after all, Ye Tian dared to enter the Eternal True Ruins, this was commendable courage.

And some of them are fifth-stage great ancestors who don't even dare to enter the Eternal True Ruins, so they might as well be this fourth-stage great ancestor.

Ye Tian ignored these fifth-stage great ancestors and directly chose to leave.

However, not long after he left the Eternal True Ruins, he was directly intercepted.

"What do you mean by the three Great Ancestors?"

Ye Tian saw that the three fifth-stage great ancestors stopped themselves in three directions, this was not a chatting posture, they were a siege posture.

"Hand over the harvest!"

One of the fifth-stage Great Ancestors said coldly.

"Harvest?" Ye Tian said lightly: "I don't have any gain." "

"Hehe, the other Great Ancestors thought that you hadn't gone deep into the Eternal True Ruins, but I had entered the Eternal True Ruins, and I had seen you in the inner area of the Eternal True Ruins. You've been able to get in there for so long, and I don't believe you have gained anything!" said a fifth-stage great ancestor.

"Oh, aren't you afraid of my Infinite Realm Armor?"

Ye Tian urged the Infinite Realm Armor Warrior and was ready to do it at any time.

"Infinite Realm Armor?" a fifth-stage Great Ancestor sneered, "Boundless Realm Armor is indeed powerful, but the three of us are also Invincible-level fifth-stage Great Ancestors. With your strength, even if the Infinite Realm Armor Warrior wraps your whole body to protect you, we can directly shock you to death with one attack!"

Swish!

The Infinite Realm Armor wrapped Ye Tian's whole body, and the battle mode was turned on.

"Come on, then!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"Do it!"

The three invincible-level fifth-stage great ancestors made a move, and a door of immeasurable magical power was killed at Ye Tian.

Bang!!!

The battle is on!

Ye Tian used the Infinite Realm Armor Warrior to confront the three invincible-level fifth-stage great ancestors, although he couldn't beat it, he wouldn't fall soon.

The attack of the three invincible fifth-stage Dao Ancestors fell on the body of the Infinite Realm Armor Warriors, and although they knocked Ye Tian away, the Infinite Realm Armor Warriors could still fight.

"What's the matter, he's not dead?"

The three Great Ancestors were shocked.

Although the defenses of the Infinite Realm Armorers are very strong, their power can still penetrate some of them.

No matter how weak a Fourth Stage Great Ancestor was, a little attack power of theirs would be enough to annihilate them countless times.

As a result, Ye Tian was fine.

"Underestimate him!"

However, the three great ancestors still did not give up, and they had to kill Ye Tian with their hole cards, and used many treasures to block time and space to prevent Ye Tian from escaping.

"It's a little difficult!"

Ye Tian felt that it was a little troublesome for him to get out of trouble, but with so many treasures on his own, it was impossible for him to give up this replica body.

At the moment, it seems that there is only one way, and that is to ask for help.

Universal Alliance.

Ye Tian begged the other Great Ancestors of the Huanyu Alliance for help, and he was willing to give a reward.

"With a piece of Tongtian True Gold, let an invincible-level fifth-stage Great Ancestor help!"

I have to say that the attraction of Tongtian Zhenjin is too sufficient.

In the blink of an eye, there were three invincible-level fifth-stage great ancestors who wanted to help.

Time passed slowly, and not much time passed.

The three invincible-level fifth-stage ancestors of the Universal Alliance are here.
